steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to introduce the Slow Food movement to a new audience. A good intro should give the reader the name, founding date, and main mission — enough orientation that someone unfamiliar with the topic understands what it is and what it stands for.

steps.title: Match to the choice
steps.content:
(A) names the movement, gives its founding year (1989), and summarizes its three main goals (universal access to healthy food, sustainable production, fair treatment of workers). It's complete and self-contained.

(B) is too thin — no name or date. (C) gives only founding facts, no mission. (D) covers only one detail.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
